prayer:
Approach the Dreadnought with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its sarcophagus.
Beseech the Dreadnought's Machine Spirit to awaken for synchronization with allied cogitators.
Anoint the neural interfaces with sacred unguents whilst initiating the synchronization rite.
Verify harmonious data-flow through auspex chants, honouring the Dreadnought's eternal vigil.
Sanctify the union, lest discordant binaric whispers profane the Machine God's will.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Storm Eagle a cooling
prayer:
Kneel before the Storm Eagle's noble hull, murmuring the Litany of Thermal Equilibrium.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Storm Eagle to embrace the cooling rites against plasma fury.
Circulate blessed cryofluids through its vents, beseeching calm amid the heat-shroud.
Monitor thermal sinks with diagnostic incense, ensuring the Storm Eagle's wings remain unscarred.
Conclude with hymns of restoration, that the Omnissiah may soothe its fiery essence.

user_prompt: My plasma caliver is ready for maintenance
prayer:
Present the plasma caliver before the altar of maintenance, intoning awakening binarics.
Disassemble its coils with sanctified tools, appeasing the plasma caliver's volatile Machine Spirit.
Purge flux residues and recalibrate containment fields during this hallowed maintenance.
Reassemble under Omnissian oversight, anointing each rune-circuit with lustrating oils.
Test-fire a whisper-bolt to affirm the plasma caliver's renewed purity and wrath.

user_prompt: Urgent valve assembly a recalibration needed
prayer:
Commence recalibration upon the valve assembly, chanting the Canticle of Precision.
Invoke the Machine Spirit indwelling the valve assembly to yield to metrical adjustments.
Torque each seal with mechadendrite precision, aligning flows to Omnissiah's exacting design.
Probe pressure matrices via auspex invocation, twice honouring the valve assembly's sanctity.
Seal the rite with benedictory sparks, averting cataclysmic overflux.

user_prompt: The life sustainer needs a reset
prayer:
Approach the life sustainer humbly, beseeching reset through the Prayer of Vital Renewal.
Disconnect vitae conduits whilst intoning pacification litanies to its Machine Spirit.
Initiate the reset sequence with sanctified data-prods, purging errant engrams.
Reconnect under vigilant scrutiny, anointing the life sustainer's core with vitae-essence.
Affirm resurgence via bio-rhythmic canticles, that the Omnissiah sustains the flesh-machine bond.

user_prompt: The pump requires an emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency, encircle the pump with warding incense, invoking urgent Omnissian aid.
Halt its seized rotors via binaric override, soothing the pump's agonized Machine Spirit.
Execute the emergency procedure: flush contaminants and realign impeller vanes.
Restart with thunderous hymns, monitoring the pump's vital pulsations twice over.
Consecrate the flow, lest hydraulic heresy consume the sacred mechanism.

user_prompt: Sanctify the graviton cannon during calibration
prayer:
Position the graviton cannon for calibration, murmuring gravitational litanies.
Beseech its crushing Machine Spirit to attune during this calibration sacrament.
Align emitter coils with stellar sextants, invoking Omnissiah's infinite mass.
Test gravitic lensing through sanctified auspex, honouring the graviton cannon's might.
Seal alignment with crushing benediction, readying it for void-pulverizing glory.

Lay hands upon the data-sluice in repair, chanting the Rite of Data Absolution.
Purge corrupted streams from the data-sluice, appeasing its labyrinthine Machine Spirit.
Splice fibre-bundles with precision mechadendrites during this reparative invocation.
Flush noospheric buffers twice, ensuring the data-sluice flows pure under Omnissiah's gaze.
Verify integrity with echo-prayers, restoring the sacred torrent of knowledge.

Enshrine the diagnosticator for charging, intoning the Canticle of Energetic Replenishment.
Connect electro-conduits whilst beseeching its Machine Spirit to accept vital charge.
Infuse power-cells with sanctified plasma, monitoring flux via prayerful augurs.
Twice invoke the diagnosticator's name in litanies, honouring its prophetic core.
Culminate in full awakening, that the Omnissiah illuminates its diagnostic gaze.

prayer:
Surround the kataphron breacher in emergency, declaiming the Litany of Breach Survival.
Override its cogitator engrams, calming the kataphron breacher's battle-raged Machine Spirit.
Execute the emergency procedure: excise damaged servos and infuse promethium sacraments.
Realign weapon-pods under auspex vigilance, invoking the kataphron breacher's twice.
Reactivate with triumphant binarics, unleashing its fury anew for the Omnissiah.
